tiles.text: You can't be half a gangster

groups.name: Boardwalk Empire
groups.explanation: Nucky Thompson and Chalky White are characters, Atlantic City is the setting, and 'You can't be half a gangster' is Nucky's famous quote — all from Boardwalk Empire.

groups.name: Won the Emmy for Outstanding Limited Series
groups.explanation: Sharp Objects (2019), Big Little Lies (2017), Mare of Easttown (2021), and The White Lotus (2022) all won the Primetime Emmy Award for Outstanding Limited or Anthology Series or Movie.

groups.name: TV Characters Living a Secret Double Life
groups.explanation: Don Draper (Mad Men) lives under a stolen identity; Lito Rodriguez (Sense8) hides his homosexuality from his public; Dexter Morgan (Dexter) is a secret serial killer; Walter White (Breaking Bad) hides his drug empire from his family.

groups.name: Cancelled by One Network, Revived by Another
groups.explanation: Arrested Development was cancelled by Fox and revived by Netflix; Veronica Mars was cancelled by The CW and revived by Hulu; Futurama was cancelled by Fox and revived by Comedy Central; Brooklyn Nine-Nine was cancelled by Fox and revived by NBC.
